headline.text: L1 Sollich 3 had *two P1 machine stops* on caramel equipment—pump down 75 minutes, depositor leak required hose replacement—both cleared by early morning.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 Sollich 2 ran steady with a 13-minute X-ray false-alarm stop at midday. Sollich 3 lost 75 minutes to a caramel pump air-lock at 20:26, cleared by 21:41, then stopped again at 22:46 for a depositor leak—team replaced bulged hose and seals, back running by 04:33. Print quality on MM6/MM7 flagged but not yet resolved. S3 team lead radio still missing.
per_plant_summary.L2: No activity in the last 24 hours.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 tested 16-17 mpm with Cavanna vendor on-site—open product dropped from 14% to 2% after cleaning buildup off guides and fingers, but bars still jamming at wrapper as of 19:34. Infeed belt roller replaced, belt trimming pending. C1 belt stopped briefly 3 times overnight. Truffle chicane belt 3 also needs trimming. ML1 finished run at 02:00 and started Level 2 clean.

resolved.title: Caramel pump low suction, air in line
resolved.summary: Condensed milk pump not creating suction, line paused at 20:26; maintenance cleared air from drain valve, cooking resumed.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance opened drain valve, sprayed air then poured milk, caramel cooking restarted; depositing resumed at 21:41—75 minutes total downtime (William).

resolved.title: Caramel depositor leaking, bulged hose
resolved.summary: Depositor began leaking at 22:46, line paused; team identified bulged hose, replaced with spare, replaced seals, cleaned and ATP passed.
resolved.resolution: Replaced bulged hose and seals, cleaned, ATP passed by 04:33—"The hose for caramel depositor bulged, we replaced... cleaned and ATP passed" (Brandon).

resolved.title: 76 bags in X-ray reject bin after lunch
resolved.summary: X-ray reject bin accumulated 76 bags during lunch break; QA halted line 13 minutes, double-checked all bags, found no defects and released.
resolved.resolution: All 76 bags re-inspected through X-ray twice, no anomalies, product released after 13 minutes (Ingrid, 12:24).

resolved.title: Tunnel 1 belt misaligned under roller
resolved.summary: Belt dragging against framework instead of running under roller; team stopped depositing to reposition.
resolved.resolution: Team released tension, repositioned roller and belt, fixed in under 2 minutes—"The team fixed it already" (William, 20:03).

resolved.title: Line paused 5 minutes for caramel
resolved.summary: Ran out of caramel batch, paused briefly while next batch finished cooking.
resolved.resolution: Next batch ready in under 5 minutes—"Line is running again" at 15:23 (William).

resolved.title: Cavanna shims dull, replaced
resolved.summary: Maintenance replaced two dull shims on Cavanna wrapper at start of shift.
resolved.resolution: Shims replaced, running at 16 mpm by 07:36—"Shim replaced running at 16mpm" (Rich).

needs_attention.title: MM6 and MM7 print quality poor
needs_attention.summary: Best-by date and lot number print quality on MM6/MM7 needs improvement; lead and supervisor working on it.
needs_attention.status: Lead and supervisor informed and working on improvements as of 17:31.

needs_attention.title: S3 team lead radio missing
needs_attention.summary: Unable to locate the Sollich 3 team lead radio during shift.
needs_attention.status: Radio not found as of 18:51, team leads and supervisors notified.

needs_attention.title: ML1 bars jamming at wrapper, not kicking correctly
needs_attention.summary: Bars not kicking off properly from infeed, causing jams when entering wrapper; ongoing issue despite Cavanna buildup cleaning.
needs_attention.status: Still having lots of jamming issues as of 19:34 despite cleaning guides and reducing open product to 2%.

needs_attention.title: ML1 infeed belt needs trimming
needs_attention.summary: Belt trimming required after replacing bad roller on Cavanna infeed belt during inverter fault recovery.
needs_attention.status: Roller replaced at 16:53, belt trimming flagged but not completed by window close.

needs_attention.title: Truffle chicane belt 3 needs trimming
needs_attention.summary: Belt edge wear identified during walkthrough, trimming required.
needs_attention.status: Belt wear spotted at 20:25, trimming flagged for follow-up.

needs_attention.title: ML1 C1 belt stopped 3 times briefly
needs_attention.summary: Conveyor belt C1 had three brief unplanned stops overnight.
needs_attention.status: Three brief stops reported as of 01:27, no further detail on cause or fix.
